user.title: Add Samsung Appliance
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Samsung appliance and the AC14K_M CA credentials used to mint device certificates. {reuse_note}

data_description.host: Local IP address of your Samsung appliance (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.ca_cert_pem: The PEM-encoded AC14K_M CA certificate chain. Paste the full contents of your fullchain PEM including all BEGIN/END CERTIFICATE blocks.
data_description.ca_key_pem: The PEM-encoded AC14K_M private key. Paste the full contents including the BEGIN/END PRIVATE KEY header and footer.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Verify the IP address is reachable and the CA credentials are correct.
error.invalid_ca: The CA certificate or private key could not be loaded. Verify the PEM contents are correct and the key matches the certificate.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
